problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Psychedelic-induced. Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
